g.title: asset.call_number_note:call_number->asset.call_number:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (call_number) REFERENCES asset.call_number(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: asset.call_number_note:creator->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (creator) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
